prompt: A full-body photorealistic portrait of a female tokusatsu-style space heroine standing in a modern concrete corridor, leaning lightly against a pale gray column. She wears a retro-futuristic armored bodysuit with glossy materials: a silver and black skin-tight jumpsuit, bulky red shoulder armor, red forearm guards, a red belt with a large rounded hip pouch, red knee-high armored boots, and white gloves. Her chest armor is metallic silver with red trim and a single circular blue orb on the right side of the chest, with small vent-like details and a mechanical collar ring around the neck connected to two short gray cables resting on the shoulders. She holds a matching red, white, blue, and black full-face helmet in her left hand at thigh level. Her hair is {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"}, medium length, slightly messy, tied back loosely with strands falling around the face. The character’s face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. The setting is an open, quiet station-like or parking-structure hallway with smooth stone walls and floor, shallow depth of field, and a blue square sign with the white number {argument name="background number" default="5"} visible in the background on the right. Natural soft daylight, realistic reflections on the glossy armor, cinematic cosplay photography, centered vertical composition, full body in frame, neutral stance, high detail.
translatedPrompt: 一张全身写实风格的女性特摄风太空女英雄肖像，她站在现代混凝土走廊中，轻轻倚靠在浅灰色立柱旁。她身穿复古未来主义盔甲紧身衣，材质具有光泽感：银黑相间的紧身连体衣、厚重的红色肩甲、红色前臂护甲、带有大号圆形腰包的红色腰带、红色及膝装甲靴以及白色手套。胸甲为金属银色，配有红色饰边，右胸处有一个圆形蓝色球体，带有小型通风口细节，颈部配有机械项圈，连接着两条垂在肩上的短灰色线缆。她左手在大腿高度拿着一个配色为红、白、蓝、黑的配套全罩式头盔。她的发色为 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"}，中等长度，略显凌乱，松散地扎在脑后，几缕发丝垂在脸颊旁。角色的面部被柔和的矩形模糊效果刻意遮挡。背景是一个开阔、安静的车站或停车场式走廊，墙壁和地面为光滑的石材，具有浅景深效果，右侧背景中可见一个带有白色数字 {argument name="background number" default="5"} 的蓝色方形标志。自然柔和的日光，光泽盔甲上的逼真反射，电影级 Cosplay 摄影，居中垂直构图，全身入镜，姿态自然，高细节。

breakdown.creativeCore: 复古太空女英雄 Cosplay 肖像：此提示词可生成一张身着光泽感复古科幻盔甲的女性全身 Cosplay 风格肖像，适用于特摄角色形象设计或电影级服装摄影。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic, retro]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
